dataset.title: A large EEG database with users' profile information for motor imagery Brain-Computer Interface research

documented_exceptions.A1: R1 and R2 were extracted from a concatenated recording and lack end-of-trial and end-of-run triggers.
documented_exceptions.A9: Only R1 was used for frequency-band selection; both acquisition recordings remain available.
documented_exceptions.A11: Only R1 was used for frequency-band selection; both acquisition recordings remain available.
documented_exceptions.A59: R5, R6, associated EEG data, and filters are missing because the participant left early.
documented_exceptions.B_questionnaire_loss: Thirteen Dataset B participants have documented losses for specified questionnaire items.
documented_exceptions.C83: ILS and 16PF5 results are documented as lost. Missing configuration assets remain an unresolved source warning.

cleaning_allowlist.frequency_csv: Remove only the verified CRCRLF empty-line artifact and emit UTF-8 LF records after nonempty-cell-matrix equivalence.
cleaning_allowlist.performance_csv: Losslessly decode CP1252 and emit UTF-8 with LF record separators after exact parsed-cell-matrix equivalence.
administrative_artifacts: invalid Office owner-lock files beginning with ~$
